name: Feature Request / User Story
about: Suggest an idea for this project or describe a user need.
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**As a** [role or user type, e.g., registered user, admin]
**I want** [some feature or action]
**So that** [value or benefit]

**Acceptance Criteria**
- [ ] Criterion 1 (e.g., Given [context], When [action], Then [outcome])
- [ ] Criterion 2

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Additional context**
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
